ksa_text: Knowledge of data pipeline orchestration and scheduling, including orchestration tools (e.g., Airflow, Prefect, Dagster), DAG design for observability and recoverability, dependency management, failure handling, retry strategies, idempotency, and SLA-driven monitoring.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: knowledge maps directly to core Data Engineer scope — DE-specific signals detected ("pipelines?", "orchestrat", "airflow"). STRM composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.3837); note that framework scores routinely underweight technical execution KSAs for this role, so text-based signal carries primary weight. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation strong: 4 job-posting-level and 1 certification-level matches (AWS DE, Databricks, dbt, GCP DE). Competency appears regularly in DE role descriptions and/or certification curricula.
